examples: Each marshmallow cloud can hold a certain number of people.
They're a campfire thing: two graham crackers with some melted marshmallow and chocolate in between.
Pretend that clouds are actually made of marshmallow clusters stuck together so that people can sit and ride on them.
Other kids would stare directly at the marshmallow and then ring the bell thirty seconds later.
Mr. Mischel, who is originally from Vienna, hasn't performed the marshmallow test on French children.
